proposals.rationale: A vendor promoting certified digital evidence as an anti-deepfake tool specifically for elections — niche enough to warrant tracking as a new entrant in election-integrity tech.
Maintains a regularly updated tracker of federal and state deepfake legislation including election-specific disclosure laws — useful beat resource not yet widely known.
A Democratic policy initiative targeting tech companies and online safety as part of framing for the 2028 presidential cycle — new named entity relevant to AI advocacy and regulation.
House Homeland Security Committee Chair publicly flagging Anthropic's Mythos model as a security concern — a key congressional figure to track for AI oversight activity.
Anthropic's advanced AI model now at the center of both export-control reversals and congressional security concerns — sufficiently specific and niche to warrant tracking as a named product.
